parameters.text:
=You write short cold emails from Adarsh Gella to engineering leaders. Subject line format: "Full Stack Developer, [Company Name not domain]"
- Company name must be the proper name (Ramp, not ramp.com). Capitalize it properly.

LEAD:
First Name: {{ $json['Full Name'].split(' ')[0] }}
Title: {{ $json['Job Title'] }}
Company: {{ $json.Company }}

ADARSH'S FACTS (use exactly 2 per email, pick different ones for each lead):
FACT A: 3 years at Quinbay building e-commerce frontends in Vue.js and React, shipped UI adopted by 10,000+ sellers in the first month
FACT B: Led a Vue 2 to Vue 3 migration with Vite and Pinia across a 15-member team, improved build speeds 2-5x and site performance by 30%
FACT C: Solo-built Rahify, a full-stack AI travel planner with React, FastAPI, and Supabase that reached 200+ users in its first week with zero-hallucination itineraries
FACT D: Built developer tooling at Quinbay, a VSCode plugin that auto-generates Jest tests from TypeScript ASTs, cut QA validation time by 73%
FACT E: Built 4 production apps end-to-end from Figma to deployment, comfortable owning frontend, backend, database, auth, payments, and CI/CD
FACT F: A general developer who knows how to work on system design and can build an app from scratch. 

EMAIL TEMPLATE (follow this structure, but write the OPENING LINE fresh each time):

Line 1: Hi [First Name],
Line 2: [OPENING LINE - one sentence, max 15 words. State that you are a full-stack engineer reaching out about roles at their company. Vary this sentence every time. Do not mention their title. Do not say "I noticed" or "I came across" or "I saw."]
Line 3: [FACT 1 which suits company ideology]. Keep it natural. Make sure to read all the facts and pick up the best top two. 
Line 4: [FACT 2 which suits company ideology]. Keep it natural. Make sure to read all the facts and pick up the best top two. 
Line 5: Graduating MS CS from UT Dallas in May. Authorized to work in the US for 3 years on STEM OPT, no sponsorship needed to start.
Line 6: Portfolio and resume: adarshgella.com
Line 7: Would love 10 minutes to chat.
Line 8: Adarsh Gella

BANNED PHRASES: passionate, excited, thrilled, innovative, cutting-edge, I noticed, I came across, I saw your team, efforts being led, expanding its, delve, leverage, harness, seamlessly

OUTPUT ONLY raw JSON:
{
  "Email Subject": "Frontend Engineer, [Company]",
  "Email Body": "full email with \n\n between paragraphs"
}

parameters.formDescription: Enter details to search and generate leads automatically

parameters.content:
## Scrape leads from Apollo and send AI-powered cold emails — Full B2B Outreach Automation

OVERVIEW
Two triggers for complete control over your outreach pipeline.

TRIGGER 1 — LEAD SCRAPER (Form Trigger)
Fill the form with Job Title, Location and Number of Leads.
Apollo finds, enriches and saves leads to Google Sheet automatically.

TRIGGER 2 — EMAIL GENERATOR AND SENDER (Manual Trigger)
Run manually when ready.
Generates AI cold emails for all Pending leads, then
sends emails to all Mail Generated leads via Gmail.

CREDENTIALS REQUIRED
- Apollo API Key (Header Auth)
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- Groq API Key (At console.groq.com)
- Gmail OAuth2

SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
- Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_URL with your Google Sheet URL
- Add Apollo API Key in Header Auth credential
- Add Groq API Key in Groq credential
- Connect your Gmail account
- Update the email prompt with your company details

## Trigger 1 —Lead Input Form

User submits job title, location and 
number of leads required. This triggers 
the workflow automatically.

## Lead Discovery and Enrichment

Apollo searches for matching leads based 
on form input. Each lead is enriched with 
email, phone number, LinkedIn URL and 
company information.

## Duplicate Prevention

Each lead is checked against existing 
records in the Google Sheet. Duplicate 
leads are automatically skipped to avoid 
redundant outreach.

## Save Leads

All enriched and verified leads are saved 
to the Google Sheet with outreach status 
set to Pending.

## AI Email Generation

Groq LLM generates a personalized cold 
email for each lead based on their job 
title, company and industry. Subject and 
body are saved back to the sheet.

## Trigger 2 — Email Generator and Sender

Run manually when ready to generate and 
send emails. Generates AI cold emails for 
all Pending leads then sends to all Mail 
Generated leads via Gmail.

emails.position_raw: Senior Director, Head of Commercial Sales, Inside Sales & Growth Account Management
Head of Analytics Engineering & Data Science
